product_overview: CareerAtlas is an agent-driven GenAI system that extracts structured profiles from user resumes, performs retrieval-grounded skill gap analysis against live role requirements, and synthesizes personalized, actionable roadmaps and job matches. The four-layer architecture and workflow diagram (see page 2) show ingestion, intelligence (agents), knowledge (vector DB & relational store), and storage layers enabling modular, RAG-grounded pipelines.
core_goals: Deterministically extract structured profile JSON (skills, education, projects, evidence) from uploaded resume PDFs.
Perform retrieval-augmented skill gap analysis against role-specific requirements (ranked by relevance and prerequisite order).
Synthesize a personalized, dependency-aware learning roadmap and project checklist using RAG + LLMs.
Match and rank relevant job opportunities aligned to the user's profile and identified gaps.
Design a modular, fault-tolerant pipeline with caching and LLM routing to remain robust under rate limits and model failures.

features.name: Onboarding Flow (Frontend)
features.description: User authentication, resume upload, target-role selection and status monitoring. Mirrors the ingestion layer and frontend routes (/onboarding, /dashboard) described in the PRD; see onboarding interactions on page 2 (ingestion diagram) and page 5 (frontend role entry).
user_flows: POST /api/auth/login with {email,password} -> Receive 200 with JWT token
POST /api/resumes with Authorization: Bearer <token> multipart/form-data (file=resume.pdf, target_role='ML Engineer') -> Receive 202 with resume_id and processing_id
GET /api/resumes/{resume_id}/status with Authorization: Bearer <token> -> Receive 200 with status 'processing' or 'complete'
GET /api/profile/{resume_id} with Authorization: Bearer <token> -> Receive 200 with structured profile JSON
POST /api/auth/login with invalid credentials -> Receive 401 Unauthorized
POST /api/resumes with Authorization: Bearer <token> and oversized file -> Receive 413 Payload Too Large

features.name: Structured Profile Extraction (Extraction Agent)
features.description: Deterministic resume parsing that produces schema-constrained profile JSON (skills, education, projects, evidence). This maps to the Extraction Agent described on page 1 and the agent table on page 3.
user_flows: POST /api/extraction/trigger with {resume_id} -> Receive 202 with extraction_job_id
GET /api/extraction/{extraction_job_id}/result -> Receive 200 with structured profile JSON (fields: skills, education, projects, evidence)
GET /api/extraction/{extraction_job_id}/result -> Receive 422 'malformed_output' when LLM output violates schema
POST /api/extraction/{extraction_job_id}/retry with {fallback_model:'groq'} -> Receive 202 queued for retry

features.name: Gap Analysis Agent (RAG-Based Skill Gap Analysis)
features.description: Compares extracted profile JSON against role requirements stored in the vector DB (Pinecone) and returns ranked skill gaps with prerequisite ordering, per the Gap Analysis Agent in Section 3 and the workflow diagram on page 2.
user_flows: POST /api/gap-analysis with {profile_id, target_role} -> Receive 202 with analysis_id
GET /api/gap-analysis/{analysis_id}/result -> Receive 200 with ranked_gaps (items include skill, gap_score, prerequisites)
GET /api/gap-analysis/{analysis_id}/result -> Receive 503 'retrieval_timeout' when Pinecone query fails
GET /api/cache/gap/{profile_id}/{target_role} -> Receive 200 with cached_ranked_gaps or 404 if no cache exists

features.name: Deep Researcher Agent (Roadmap & Action Plan Synthesis)
features.description: Synthesizes a personalized roadmap, learning plan, and project checklist using RAG grounding (Pinecone) plus LLM synthesis. See Deep Researcher Agent and outputs table on page 2 and agent orchestration notes on page 3.
user_flows: POST /api/research/roadmap with {profile_id, analysis_id} -> Receive 202 with research_id
GET /api/research/{research_id}/result -> Receive 200 with roadmap JSON (learning_steps, projects, checklist, priorities)
POST /api/research/roadmap with high-volume requests -> Receive 429 'rate_limited' from LLM routing layer
GET /api/cache/roadmap/{profile_id} -> Receive 200 with cached_roadmap as fallback

features.name: Job Finder Agent (Job Matching & Ranking)
features.description: Finds, filters and ranks public job postings aligned with the user's profile and identified gaps; integrates external job APIs and caches results. Functionality parallels the Job Finder Agent described on page 3 and the feasibility table on page 5.
user_flows: POST /api/jobs/search with {profile_id, analysis_id, target_role} -> Receive 202 with job_search_id
GET /api/jobs/search/{job_search_id}/result -> Receive 200 with ranked job_listings (title, company, match_score, url)
POST /api/jobs/search with {profile_id,...} -> Receive 502 'external_job_api_failure' when upstream job API errors
GET /api/cache/jobs/{profile_id}/{target_role} -> Receive 200 with cached_job_listings or 204 No Content if none

routes.description: User signs in and uploads their resume

features.name: Onboarding Flow
features.description: Wait for AI tracking to finish on frontend
